name: Puzzle: Fire Sticks
short_description: Over 100 levels of varying difficulty! The gameplay is very simple - rearrange the matches so that you get mathematical equality, be smart, collect bonuses, open hidden levels and much more.
detailed_description:
Hello! I started creating this puzzle at the request of my girlfriend))) The first version was liked by my friends and I decided to run it in Steam. The gameplay is very simple - rearrange the matches so that you get mathematical equality, be smart, collect bonuses, open hidden levels and much more.

Key Features:
- The game has more than 100 levels of varying difficulty;
- Each level has at least one solution, but you can find your own and you will be awarded;
- Bonus levels for non-standard passing;
- You can use a fire extinguisher and other auxiliary tools;
- For skillful passage you can get items of Steam inventory;
- In the near future, new game elements and levels will be added;

If you like the game, I will make updates, new levels, trading cards and more. The price is symbolic - buy and enjoy! This is not the last project, write your wishes and ideas, we will do it!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Bulgarian*, Hungarian*, Vietnamese*, Danish*, Traditional Chinese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*, Dutch*, Norwegian*, Polish*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Romanian*, Russian*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*, Finnish*, Czech*, Swedish*, Japanese*
